title: Peltopus scutifer
taxonomy: Peltopus scutifer is classified within the family of sea hares, specifically in the genus Peltopus, which belongs to the phylum Mollusca. This classification places Peltopus scutifer as a type of sea slug. As a member of the phylum Mollusca, Peltopus scutifer shares characteristics with other mollusks, such as snails and slugs. The family of sea hares, to which Peltopus scutifer belongs, is characterized by their large size and unique body shape. This classification helps identify and understand the unique features of Peltopus scutifer within the broader group of sea hares and mollusks.
